name: Blue Thunder Mining Inc.
summary: Blue Thunder Mining Inc., a mineral exploration company, focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for gold, as well as volcanogenic massive sulphide deposits with associated base and precious metals. It holds a 100% interest in the Muus project that include 872 claims covering 48,500 hectares located in the southern part of the James Bay area of the Province of Quebec. The company is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
